info.title: List Clusters
info.description: List Redshift clusters in a region.

get.summary: List all Redshift clusters in a region
get.description: Returns a list of all Redshift provisioned clusters in the specified AWS region with basic configuration details.

parameters.name: region
parameters.description: AWS region to list clusters from (default: us-east-1)

parameters.name: user_id
parameters.description: Identity of the person who initiated the request
